headline: Maxence Lacroix
body:
🚨🔵 Chelsea have started contacts to begin Maxence Lacroix operation as top target at centre back. 🔛

Lacroix, open to the move.

Another target for Chelsea after Palestra. ➕

🎥 piped.video/M5cW9HZohWQ?si=sSd2…
